title: Phase 1: Wiki Text Scraping & Storage
description: Scrape 1,553 wiki pages (characters, arcs, sagas) via MediaWiki API, parse wikitext to plaintext, store in Supabase wiki_text table.

title: Wikitext cleaner: parse raw wikitext to plaintext + sections
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/parsers/wikitext_cleaner.py. Strip {{templates}}, [[links]], <ref> tags, HTML. Extract sections from == headers ==. Return clean text + section dict. Add tests.

title: Wiki text scraper: fetch pages via MediaWiki API
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/scrapers/wiki_text_scraper.py. Use existing FandomAPIClient. Fetch action=parse&page={slug}&prop=wikitext for each page. Parse with wikitext_cleaner. Rate limit 1 req/sec. Support characters, arcs, sagas.

title: Supabase wiki_text table + upload
description: Create migration SQL for wiki_text table (page_id, page_type, title, intro_text, full_text, sections JSONB). Upload scraped data to Supabase. Add RLS for public read.

title: CLI commands: make wiki-scrape
description: Add Makefile targets: wiki-scrape, wiki-scrape-characters, wiki-scrape-arcs, wiki-status. Wire to the scraper.

title: Phase 2: Embeddings & Vector Search
description: Chunk wiki text, generate embeddings with sentence-transformers (local, free), store in Supabase pgvector, create search function.

title: Chunker: split wiki text into searchable chunks
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/embeddings/chunker.py. Split by wiki sections. Max ~800 tokens per chunk with 100-token overlap for long sections. Each chunk has metadata (page_id, page_type, title, section_name). Add tests.

title: Embedder: generate embeddings with sentence-transformers
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/embeddings/embedder.py. Use all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384 dims, runs on CPU). Batch encode. ~2GB RAM, ~2 min for 15K chunks.

title: Supabase pgvector table + search function
description: Enable vector extension. Create wiki_chunks table with embedding column. Create ivfflat index. Create search_wiki RPC function for similarity search. Migration SQL.

title: Upload pipeline + CLI: make embed-wiki
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/embeddings/uploader.py. Upload chunks + embeddings to Supabase. Add Makefile targets: embed-wiki, embed-status, search.

title: Phase 3: RAG Chat with Groq
description: Build CLI chatbot with tool-calling LLM (Groq free tier). Tools: query_database (SQL), search_wiki (vector), get_character_profile (combined).

title: Tool definitions and handlers
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/rag/tools.py (tool JSON schemas) and tool_handlers.py (implementations). query_database: read-only SQL with validation. search_wiki: embed query → pgvector search. get_character_profile: fuzzy match + structured data + wiki intro.

title: Chat loop with Groq LLM
description: Create src/onepieceofdata/rag/chat.py. System prompt with One Piece context. Tool-calling loop. Conversation history. Use Groq free tier (llama3-70b, 30 RPM).

title: CLI chat interface: make chat
description: Interactive CLI with readline. Show tool calls inline. CC-BY-SA attribution. Add Makefile target.

title: Phase 4: React Chat UI
description: Add chat interface to onepieceofdata-react. Either via Supabase Edge Function or FastAPI backend.
